revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_with_count%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Expensive}} {{Template shortcut|clc|CLC}} {{Lua|Module:String}} == About == {{tl|Category link with count}} generates a link to a category followed by the number of pages in the category. It uses the [[mw:Help:Magic words#PAGESINCATEGORY|PAGESINCATEGORY]] [[Help:Magic words#Parser functions|parser function]]. == Usage == One parameter * {{tlc|Category link with count|CATEGORY}} * {{tlc|clc|CATEGORY}} Two parameters * {{tlc|Category link with count|CATEGORY|TYPE}} * {{tlc|clc|CATEGORY|TYPE}} Name label * {{tlc|Category link with count|Category:Guans (bird)|name=CAT:Guans}} → {{clc|Category:Guans (bird)|name=CAT:Guans}} == Examples == Using the template shortcut {{tlx|clc}}: === One parameter === Prefix namespace {{mono|Category}} is optional. Without "Category:" * {{tlc|clc|Côte-d'Or}} → {{clc|Côte-d'Or}} With "Category:" * {{tlc|clc|Category:Côte-d'Or}} → {{clc|Category:Côte-d'Or}} === Two parameters === * {{tlc|clc|Côte-d'Or|pages}} → {{clc|Côte-d'Or|pages}} * {{tlc|clc|Côte-d'Or|subcats}} → {{clc|Côte-d'Or|subcats}} * {{tlc|clc|Côte-d'Or|files}} → {{clc|Côte-d'Or|files}} * {{tlc|clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|pages}} → {{clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|pages}} * {{tlc|clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|subcats}} → {{clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|subcats}} * {{tlc|clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|files}} → {{clc|Category:Côte-d'Or|files}} ===Name label===
{{para|name|}}
* {{clc|Côte-d'Or|name=Cd'O}} → {{clc|Côte-d'Or|name=Cd'O}} ==See also== {{Internal category-link templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal category-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
